message: I've been digging into how to actually *think* about hurricane prep instead of just panicking when one's coming—turns out there's a whole framework for it that makes things feel way more manageable. Ready.gov has this resource that walks through the practical steps without the drama, and honestly it changed how I approach weather season. What's your go-to move when a big storm's in the forecast—do you prep ahead or wait to see how it develops?
